paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 5.93, which represents a 5.12 percent decrease from the prior close and a 31.52 percent decrease over the last 20 sessions.

There have been 4 new news articles in the last 24 hours, with headlines discussing governance questions and the potential undervaluation of the company. Recent news includes the resignation of director Miles Everson due to disagreements over governance practices and access to board records.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has been one Form 4 filing and no Form 144 filings.
